title: Evangelion 3010 2020
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion 3.0+1.0: 2020             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Jul 20, 2018 2:05 am Posting this here from the front page news post: https://www.evageeks.org/2018/07/evangelion-final-2020/ A teaser that was shown before the screening of Hosada's Mirai of the Future said that Final had a 2020 release date.

[]: Re: Evangelion Final: 2020             Quote Post by Joseki » Fri Jul 20, 2018 2:14 am I'm not a mod but shouldn't the post in the Official Social Media thread be moved here? Back to topic: Anno will be 60 in 2020, he's getting old...

[]: Re: Evangelion Final: 2020             Quote Post by pwhodges » Fri Jul 20, 2018 2:48 am Well, I'll be 74... The timetable gives more opportunity to read speculative fan fiction!

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media             Quote Post by Lord Roem » Fri Jul 20, 2018 3:14 am Khara's website and the official Eva one have both been updated - 2020. Trailers running until the end of the month.

[]: Re: Evangelion Final: 2020             Quote Post by Lord Roem » Fri Jul 20, 2018 3:23 am Certainly looks official - the website's been updated.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media             Quote Post by Joseki » Fri Jul 20, 2018 3:28 am Lord Roem wrote: Khara's website and the official Eva one have both been updated - 2020. Trailers running until the end of the month.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media             Quote Post by HARVEST » Fri Jul 20, 2018 3:58 am Toho and Toei working together, this is something I never thought I would see.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Fri Jul 20, 2018 4:14 am So is this an actual trailer showing some footage?

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media             Quote Post by Joseki » Fri Jul 20, 2018 4:25 am New "introduction" page on the website エヴァがついに完結する。 2007年から『ヱヴァンゲリヲン新劇場版』シリーズとして再起動し、『：序』『：破』『：Ｑ』の3作を公開してきた。その最新作、第4部『シン・エヴァンゲリオン劇場版』の劇場公開が決定。 人の本質とは何か？ 人は何のために生きるのか？ エヴァのテーマは、いつの時代にも通じる普遍的な核を持っている。 シンジ、レイ、アスカ、マリ、個性にあふれたキャラクターたちが、人造人間エヴァンゲリオンに搭乗し、それぞれの生き方を模索する。 人と世界の再生を視野に入れた壮大な世界観と細部まで作り込まれた緻密な設定、デジタル技術を駆使した最新映像が次々と登場し、美しいデザインと色彩、情感あふれる表現が心に刺さる。 スピーディーで濃密、一度観たら病みつきになるその語り口は、興行収入80億円超えの大作『シン・ゴジラ』も記憶に新しい庵野秀明総監督による独特の境地。 その庵野総監督がアニメーションのフィールドで創作の原点に立ち返り、新たな構想と心境によって2012年の『ヱヴァンゲリヲン新劇場版：Ｑ』以後、封印されてきた物語の続きを語る。 1995年にTVシリーズ『新世紀エヴァンゲリオン』でアニメファンのみならず、アーティストや学者までを巻き込んで社会現象を起こした初出から、実に25年――その間、常にエポックメイキングであり続けた「エヴァンゲリオン」の、新たな姿を見届けよう。 Machine translation (a better translation would be useful) SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Jul 20, 2018 5:52 am I’m gonna confess an impure thought, a false and betraying thought, but one most of us at least had lingering in the background. Thank God that Anno didn’t let Shin Eva become the Half-Life 3 of anime films. Like, I knew he wouldn’t let that happen, Khara’s been updating us coonsistrntly for well over a year now stifling those fears, and Q was surprisingly less anxious for me to wait after than Ha. But thank Christ Almighty that Eva wasn’t orphaned. Let us be thankful even for the inevitable. It healthy for the soul. Oh god, I’m tearing up now. It’s so good. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media             Quote Post by Joseki » Fri Jul 20, 2018 6:16 am https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7iAU84Bd_zI Here the teaser!

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Jul 20, 2018 6:46 am It's so beautiful!

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Fri Jul 20, 2018 7:16 am If you had told me in early 2013 (after I first saw Q) that we would get a new Star Wars trilogy fully released before the next Rebuild film was out, I would have laughed in your face...and then would have become sad because I would have thought that such a long gap would have been due to Anno either dying tragically or abandoning the project, and Tsurumaki stepping up and taking years to get the last film off the ground.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media             Quote Post by Joseki » Fri Jul 20, 2018 7:33 am tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) According to machine translation having both TOHO and Toei logos at the beginning of the movie was Anno's long-held dream.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media             Quote Post by hui43210 » Fri Jul 20, 2018 7:34 am So now that I'm past the shock (sort of), here's a question, how often do you have both TOHO and Toei distributing the same film? That's really rare isn't? The Khara twitter said it was a dream of Anno to have both on the same screen, so is this a first? Edit^ Lol, beat me by a min.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media             Quote Post by Joseki » Fri Jul 20, 2018 7:50 am ^ That's a good question EDIT: based on a quick look at Wikipedia it may very well be the first movie ever.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media             Quote Post by HARVEST » Fri Jul 20, 2018 7:57 am Toho and Toei distributing a film together would be like Disney and Warner Bros. working together in one film (oh wait, The Prestige opened with the Touchstone Pictures (Disney's former label for less-kid-friendly films) logo and the Warner Bros. logo, while it's distributed by Disney in the US and Warner Bros. internationally). Also, there was that one scene in Who Framed Roger Rabbit (a Disney film) where Bugs Bunny and Mickey Mouse are on-screen together.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media             Quote Post by hui43210 » Fri Jul 20, 2018 8:22 am HARVEST wrote: Also, there was that one scene in Who Framed Roger Rabbit (a Disney film) where Bugs Bunny and Mickey Mouse are on-screen together.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Jul 20, 2018 8:35 am Toei and Toho aren't just distributors. They have production facilities and lots of resources to actually make both live action and animation, and Khara used some of them in the past, especially for 3.0. It could be Anno just wants to make the most expensive animated movie Japan has ever produced and is pulling everyone in for the ride :P

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media             Quote Post by DrthRvn » Fri Jul 20, 2018 8:38 am If toho and toei are collaborating, can we expect a worldwide release?
